summary: Completed E2E testing of Market Data system - Upload (CSV), Download (Dukascopy), Coverage, Fix Gaps, Delete endpoints. All 18 tests passed. BI5 import fix verified (correct import from market_data_models). Export endpoint is NOT registered (function exists but missing route decorator).

critical.issue: Export endpoint function exists (line 2903) but is NOT registered with @api_router decorator - returns 405 Method Not Allowed

passed_tests: CSV import with valid 1m data - imports correctly
CSV import with invalid data - correctly rejected (400/500)
CSV import with empty data - correctly rejected
Coverage endpoint returns symbols array with timeframe metrics
Dukascopy download starts background task correctly
Dukascopy download rejects invalid date format (400)
Dukascopy task status returns 404 for non-existent task
Fix gaps endpoint works (no gaps scenario)
Fix gaps forces 1m architecture (ignores higher TF requests)
Get market data after import works
Get market data rejects invalid timeframe (400)
action_items: Add @api_router.get('/marketdata/export') decorator to export_market_data function at line 2903 in server.py
critical_code_review_comments: export_market_data function (line 2903) is defined but NOT registered as an API route - needs @api_router.get('/marketdata/export') decorator
BI5 import fix verified: correctly imports Candle from market_data_models (line 1950)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix (TEST_EURUSD, TEST_GET, etc.) and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All market data endpoints working except export. BI5 import fix verified. Dukascopy download works but may timeout on certain dates (holidays). Database has 38,872 real candles from Dukascopy/CSV sources. 1m architecture is enforced - all data stored as 1m candles.
